get.description: Get a blink for deposit operations on a reserve

schema.description: The percentage of funds to use
The amount to use. Human readable value, e.g. 0.1 SOL

account.description: The public key of the account that executes the transaction

get.description: Get a blink for withdraw operations on a reserve

schema.description: The percentage of funds to withdraw
The amount to withdraw. Human readable value (not lamports), e.g. 0.1 SOL. If amount close to the deposited amount (99.9%), the full amount will be withdrawn

account.description: The public key of the account that executes the transaction

get.description: Get a blink for borrow operations on a reserve

schema.description: The percentage of borrow capacity to use
The amount to borrow. Human readable value, e.g. 0.1 SOL

account.description: The public key of the account that executes the transaction

get.description: Get a blink for repay operations on a reserve

schema.description: The percentage of borrowed amount to repay
The amount to repay. Human readable value, e.g. 0.1 SOL

account.description: The public key of the account that executes the transaction

get.description: Get a blink for repaying debt using collateral

post.description: Execute a repay with collateral operation

schema.description: The percentage of borrowed amount to repay
The amount to repay. Human readable value, e.g. 0.1 SOL

account.description: The public key of the account that executes the transaction

get.description: Get a blink for claiming rewards on a reserve

account.description: The public key of the account that executes the transaction

get.description: Get metadata for depositing into a liquidity vault.

schema.description: The side of the vault to deposit to

post.description: Generate a transaction for depositing into a liquidity vault.

schema.description: The amount to use. Human readable value, e.g. 0.1
The side of the vault to deposit to

account.description: The public key of the account that executes the transaction

get.description: Get metadata for withdrawing from a liquidity vault.

post.description: Generate a transaction for withdrawing from a liquidity vault.

schema.description: The percentage of shares to withdraw (1-100)

account.description: The public key of the account that executes the transaction

get.description: Get metadata for setting up multiply position (LUT creation).

post.description: Generate transactions for setting up multiply position (LUT creation).

account.description: The public key of the account that executes the transaction

get.description: Get metadata for depositing with leverage/multiply.

post.description: Generate a transaction for depositing with leverage/multiply.

schema.description: The side of the multiply to deposit to
The amount to deposit. Human readable value, e.g. 0.1 JLP

account.description: The public key of the account that executes the transaction

get.description: Get metadata for withdrawing from multiply position.

post.description: Generate a transaction for withdrawing from multiply position.

schema.description: The side of the multiply to withdraw from
The percentage of position to withdraw (1-100)

account.description: The public key of the account that executes the transaction

get.description: Get metadata for setting up leverage position (LUT creation).

post.description: Generate transactions for setting up leverage position (LUT creation).

account.description: The public key of the account that executes the transaction

get.description: Get metadata for opening a leverage position.

post.description: Generate a transaction for opening a leverage position.

schema.description: The side of the leverage to deposit to
The amount to open position. Human readable value, e.g. 0.1 SOL

account.description: The public key of the account that executes the transaction

get.description: Get metadata for closing a leverage position.

post.description: Generate a transaction for closing a leverage position.

schema.description: The side of the leverage to withdraw from
The percentage of position to close

account.description: The public key of the account that executes the transaction

post.description: Generate a transaction to claim all rewards for a farm.

account.description: The public key of the account that executes the transaction

get.description: Get a blink for claiming rewards operations on a vault

schema.description: Vault public key or slug (kebab-case vault name)
Vault public key or slug (kebab-case vault name)

account.description: The public key of the account that executes the transaction

get.description: Get a blink for deposit operations on a vault

schema.description: Vault public key or slug (kebab-case vault name)
Vault public key or slug (kebab-case vault name)
The percentage of funds to use. For withdrawals, if percentage is >= 99.9%, a full withdrawal will be performed
The amount to use. Human readable value (not lamports), e.g. 0.1 SOL. For withdrawals, if amount is close to the deposited amount (>= 99.9%), a full withdrawal will be performed

account.description: The public key of the account that executes the transaction

get.description: Get a blink for withdraw operations on a vault

schema.description: Vault public key or slug (kebab-case vault name)
Vault public key or slug (kebab-case vault name)
The percentage of funds to use. For withdrawals, if percentage is >= 99.9%, a full withdrawal will be performed
The amount to use. Human readable value (not lamports), e.g. 0.1 SOL. For withdrawals, if amount is close to the deposited amount (>= 99.9%), a full withdrawal will be performed

account.description: The public key of the account that executes the transaction
